titleStmt.title: Vatican City, Biblioteca Apostolica Vaticana, Aeth. 29

Directives for the Psalms, Excerpt from the Gospel of John, Prayers of confession, Malkǝʾ-hymns, Anaphora of Our Lady by Cyriacus of Behnesa, Wǝddāse Māryām, Daily prayers and invocations, Miracles of Mary, Rule of Santo Stefano de' Mori

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

availability.licence: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

msItem.title: Directives for the Psalms
msItem.note: The text is in Arabic, written in Ethiopic script
msItem.incipit: መዝሙር፡ አልአወል፡ ፩፡ ኢዳ፡ ርድት፡ አስተአጢ፡ ባ፡ ለእንሰን፡ እቅራሐ፡
مزمور الاول ١ اذا ردت استاطي ... لانسان اقراء
msItem.explicit: መዝሙር፡ ፶ወ፪፡ ምን፡ ይክትብ፡ ወያአልቅ፡ አለ፡ ነፍሰ፡ ትውለድ፡ ብልአዢል፡
منزور ٥٢ من يكتب وياعلق على نفساء تولد بالعجل

item.desc: The shelfmark of the Vatican Library Aeth. 29 is written on a sheet glued on .

bibl.title: Bybliothecae apostolicae Vaticanae codices manu scripti recensiti iussu Pii XI Pontificis maximi. Codices Aethiopici Vaticani et Borgiani, Barberinianus orientalis 2, Rossianus 865<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Enarratio codicum

msItem.title: Excerpt from Gospel of John 19:22-20:10
msItem.note: The Ammonian sections and the Eusebian canons are written in the margin; the titles of the sections and the liturgical directives are written in the text: በዓርብ፡ በ፱፡ ሰዓት።, በዓርብ፡ ሶበ፡ ይዓርብ፡ ጸሓይ።, ፳፡ በእንተ፡ ዘሰአለ፡ ዮሴፍ፡ ሥጋሁ፡ ለእግዚእነ፨, በፋሲካ፡ ምንባብ።.

bibl.title: Bybliothecae apostolicae Vaticanae codices manu scripti recensiti iussu Pii XI Pontificis maximi. Codices Aethiopici Vaticani et Borgiani, Barberinianus orientalis 2, Rossianus 865<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Enarratio codicum

msItem.title: Prayers of confession
msItem.note: From the Latin missal, translated into Ethiopic

msItem.title: Malkǝʾ-hymn to the Apostles
msItem.incipit: ሰላም፡ ለኮ፡ ጴጥሮስ፡ ዘሮሜ፡ አምደ፡ ሃይማኖት፡ ቀዋሜ፡ ፄወ፡ መለኮት፡

msItem.title: Malkǝʾ-hymn to Gabra Krǝstos
msItem.incipit: ሰላም፡ ለከ፡ ገብረ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ሰላማዊ፡ መናኔ፡ ዓለም፡ ምድራዌ፡ ዓጽፈ፡ ድንግልና፡ ስርግው፡

msItem.title: Malkǝʾ-hymn to ʾabbā ʾAbib
msItem.incipit:
ሰላም፡ ለከ፡ አባ፡ አቤብ፨ ወልደ፡ አብርሃም፡ ጠቢብ፡ ጥዑም፡ ምግብር፡
እምአር፡
ዘንሀም፡

item.desc: Scribbles; the number 40, probably due to a foliation of the 17th century.
The number 41, probably due to a foliation of the 17th century.
The number 43, probably due to a foliation of the 17th century, is erased.
The number 47, probably due to a foliation of the 17th century, is corrected into 15.

bibl.title: Bybliothecae apostolicae Vaticanae codices manu scripti recensiti iussu Pii XI Pontificis maximi. Codices Aethiopici Vaticani et Borgiani, Barberinianus orientalis 2, Rossianus 865<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Enarratio codicum

msItem.title: Anaphora of Our Lady by Cyriacus of Behnesa
msItem.note: The fragment begins with the word መሰረተ፡ (cp. Testamentum Novum: Cum Epistola Pauli Ad Hebreos tantum, cum concordantijs Evangelistarum Eusebii & numeratione omnium verborum eorundem. Missale cum benedictione incensi cerae et c. Alphabetum in lingua ግእዝ፡ gheez, idest libera quia a nulla alia originem duxit, & vulgo dicitur Chaldea, Quae omnia Fr. Petrus Ethyops auxilio piorum sedente Paulo. III. Pont. MAx. & Claudio illius regni Imperatore imprimi curavitPetrus EthyopsRomaeImpensis Petri Comos Ethiopis, Valerius Doricus1548https://books.google.de/books?id=KPNa9Mc5gjYC171b, l. 15) and terminates with the word ዘኢይትረከብ፡ (cp. Testamentum Novum: Cum Epistola Pauli Ad Hebreos tantum, cum concordantijs Evangelistarum Eusebii & numeratione omnium verborum eorundem. Missale cum benedictione incensi cerae et c. Alphabetum in lingua ግእዝ፡ gheez, idest libera quia a nulla alia originem duxit, & vulgo dicitur Chaldea, Quae omnia Fr. Petrus Ethyops auxilio piorum sedente Paulo. III. Pont. MAx. & Claudio illius regni Imperatore imprimi curavitPetrus EthyopsRomaeImpensis Petri Comos Ethiopis, Valerius Doricus1548https://books.google.de/books?id=KPNa9Mc5gjYC172b, l. 6).

supportDesc.condition: The black ink is partly faded away.

item.desc: The number 36, due to a foliation of the 17th century.

bibl.title: Bybliothecae apostolicae Vaticanae codices manu scripti recensiti iussu Pii XI Pontificis maximi. Codices Aethiopici Vaticani et Borgiani, Barberinianus orientalis 2, Rossianus 865<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Enarratio codicum

msItem.title: Ordinary of the mass
msItem.note: The text terminates abruptly due to material loss.

supportDesc.foliation: Leaves have been foliated with Arabic numbers in a 17th-century hand.

item.desc:
The title fragmenta Liturgiarum
and possibly the shelfmark 29 are written in the upper margin in a 17th-century hand.

origin.note: The name of ʾaṣe Lǝbna Dǝngǝl is mentioned in the prayers.

bibl.title: Bybliothecae apostolicae Vaticanae codices manu scripti recensiti iussu Pii XI Pontificis maximi. Codices Aethiopici Vaticani et Borgiani, Barberinianus orientalis 2, Rossianus 865<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Enarratio codicum

msItem.title: Prayer for the time of the twilight
Prayers of praise and thanksgiving
msItem.incipit: እግዚኦ፤ መሐረነ፤ ክርስቶስ፨ ፫ጊዜ፨ ጸጋ፤ ዘእግዚአብሔር፤ ይሃሉ፤ ምስሌክሙ፨ ይ፤ ሕ፤ ምስለ፡ መንፈስከ፨ ይ፡ ካ፤ ንሴብሖ፤ ለአምላክነ፨ ይ፤ ሕ፤ ርቱዕ፤ ወይደሉ፨ ይ፤ ካ፤ አጽንዑ፤ ልበክሙ፨ ይ፤ ሕ፤ ብነ፤ ኃበ፤ እግዚአብሔር፤ አምላክነ፡ አቡነ፤ ዘበሰማያት፨ አቡነ፤ ዘበሰማያት፤ አቡነ፤ ዘበሰማያት፤ ኢታብአነ፤ እግዚኦ፤ ውስተ፤ መንሱት፨ እግዚአብሔር፤ አብ፤ ወሃቤ፤ ብርሃን፨ ዘለኵሉ፤ ሐይል፤ ወለኵሉ፤ ነፍስ፤ ኃዋጺ፤
msItem.explicit:
እግዝእትነ፤ ማርያም፨ ነጽሪ፤ ለዕለኤነ፤ ጸልዪ፤ ለደቂቅኪ፤ ወአድኅንነ፨ እምኵሉ፤ ምንዳቤ፤ ወኃዘን፨ በእደ፤ መልአኩ፤ መድኅን፤ ይዕቀበነ፤ ወይክሥት፡ አዕይንተ፤ አልባቢነ፤ ይምርኃነ፤ ክርስቶስ፤ ፍኖተ፤ ጽድቅ፤ ወሕይወት፨ ማዓልተ፤ ምስሌነ፤ ወሌሊተ፤ ማእከሌነ፤ አንተ፤ እግዚኦ፤ ኢትርኃቅ፤ እምኔነ፨
ሃሊ፡ ሃሉ፡ ምስሌነ፤ ረዳኤ፤ ኵነነ፨
ኢትግድፈነ፤ ወኢትመንነ፤ አምላከ፤ ሰለም፤
ሰላም፤ ሃበነ፨

msItem.title: Prayer for the time of the sleep
Prayer of the middle of the night
msItem.note: ʾAṣe Galāwdewos is mentioned in the supplication formula for the king; Tasfā Ṣǝyon is mentioned in the supplication formula for the dead.

msItem.title: Miracles of Mary
msItem.incipit: እምብዙሕ፡ ተአምሪሃ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ቅድስት፤ ድንግል፤ በክልኤ፤ ማርያም፨ ዘበእብራይስጢ፤ ማርያም፡ ወለዲተ፤ አምላክ፨ ጸሎታ፤ ወበረከታ፤ የኃሉ፤ ምስለ፤ ገብረ፤ ተንሥአ፤ ወልድ፤ ለዓለመ፤ ዓለም፤ አሜን፨
msItem.note: The incipit mentions Tanśǝʾa Wald. The text is followed by the same prayer as in No item: BAVet1#ms_i4.9 .

msItem.title: Miracle of the feverish woman healed by Mary in Bethlehem
msItem.incipit: እምብዙሕ፡ ተአምሪሃ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ወለዲተ፤ አምላክ፨ ወመጽአት፤ አሐቲ፤ ብእሲት፤ እምድረ፡ ግብጽ፤ እንዘ፤ ሀለወት፤ እግዝእትነ፤ ቅድስት፤ ድንግል፤ በክልኤ፤ ማርያም፤ ወለዲተ፤ አምላክ፨ በቤተ፤ ልሔም፤ እንዘ፡ ትፈጽን፤ ዓቢየ፤ ፈጸንት፨
msItem.explicit:
ወመኑ፤ ዘበጽሐ፤ ኀቤሃ፤ ትኩዝ፤ ወኢጸገወቶ፤ ፍሥሐ፤
ወሐሤት፨ መኑ፤ ዘበጽሐ፤ ኀቤሃ፤ ዘቦ፤ መፍቅደ፤ ኅሊና፤ ወኢጸገወቶ፤ መፍቅዶ፨ ጸሎተ፤ ወበረከታ፤ የሀሉ፤ ምስለ፤ ገብረ፤ ተንሥዓ፤ ወልድ፨ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፤ አሜን፨
msItem.note: Possibly copied from No item: BAVet54#p4_i3. Tanśǝʾa Wald is mentioned in the supplication formula at the end of the text.

msItem.title: On the sepulchre of Our Lady Mary, ark of those who worship her in the day of the Day of the Judgment
msItem.incipit:
እ ምብዙሕ፡ ተአምሪሃ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ስምዑኬ፤ አኃውየ፤ ዘንተ፤ ምስጢረ፤ መንክረ፤ ወመድምመ፤ ዘነገሩነ፤ አበዊነ፤ ቅዱሳን፤ ዘረከብዎ፤ ጽሑፍ፤ ውስተ፤ መጽሐፍት፨ ወይቤሉ፤ አመ፤ ይመጽእ፤ እግዚእነ፤ በዳግም፤ ምጽአቱ፤ በዓቢይ፤ ስብሐት፤ ምስለ፤ መለእክት፤
ወኃይለት፨
ወበንፍሐተ፤ ቀርን፤ ወይትነስኡ፤ ሙታን፤
msItem.explicit: ወይቤሉ፤ በደሐሪት፤ ዕለት፤ ትከውን፤ ከመ፤ ሐመር፤ ወታዓድዎሙ፤ ለኵሎሙ፤ ሕዝበ፤ ክርስቲያን፤ እለ፤ ገብሩ፤ በዓለ፤ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ቅድስት፤ ድንግል፤ በክልኤ፤ ማርያም። ወለዲተ፤ አምላክ፨ ወመሐሩ፤ ነዳያን፤ ወምስኪናን፤ በስማ፤ ወታስተፌስሖሙ፤ በመንግሥተ፤ ሰማያት፤ ወታወርሶሙ፤ ሕይወተ፤ ዘለዓለም፨ ጸሎተ፤ ወበረከታ፤

msItem.title: Miracle of the two women Juliana and Barbara, who were robbed on a pilgrimage to Jerusalem
msItem.incipit:
እምብዙሕ፡ ተአምሪሃ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ወሀለዋ፤ ክልኤቱ፤ አንስት፤ አዕማተ፤ እግዝእትነ፤ ቅድስት፤ ድንግል፤ በክልኤ፤ ማርያም። ወለዲተ፤ አምላክ፤ በቤተ፤ ልሔም፤ እምአዋልድ፤ ይሁዳ፨ ቀአሐተ፤ ዕለተ፤ እንዘ፤ የሐወራ፤ ኢየሩሳሌም፤ ይስግዳ፤ ለብዓለ፤ ፍልሰታ፤ ለእግዝእትነ፤ ቅድስት፤ ድንግል፤ በክልኤ፨ ማርያም፡ ወለዲተ፤
አምለክ፨ ዐገትዎን፤ ፈያት፤ በውስተ፤ ፍኖት፤ ወነስእዎን፤ ስንቆን፤ ለዮልያና፤ ወለበርባራ፤ አዕማተ፤ እግዝእትነ፤
msItem.explicit:
ወኀደጉ፤ እከየ፤ ምግበሪሆሙ፡ ወፈደይዎን፤ ለቅዱሳት፤ አንስት፤ ዮልያና፤ ወበርበራ፤ አዕማአተ፤ እግዝእትነ፤ ቅድስት፤ ድንግል፤ በክልኤ፨ ማርያም፤ ወለዲተ፤ አምላክ፤ ንዋየ፤ ፍዳ፡ ብዙኀ፡ ምክዕቢተ፡ ህይንተ፡
ዘነስኡ፡ ስንቆን፤ በፍኖት፨ ወመሐከቶሙ፤ ቅድስት፤ መዝገበ፤ ምሕረት፤ ወሜጠት፤ አስናኒሆሙ፤ በከመ፤ ህለዌሁ፤
ጸሎተ፤
ወበረከታ፤

msItem.title: Miracle of the murderer who was killed after washing in a river sanctified by Our Lady Mary
msItem.incipit: እምብዙሕ፤ ተአምሪሃ፤ ለእግዝእትነ፤ ስምዑ፤ ኦማኅበረ፤ ቤተ፤ ክርስቲያን፤ እለ፤ መጸእክሙ፤ ትስምዑ፤ ጠዕሙ፤ ተአምሪሃ፤ ለድንግል፨ ወእምድኅረ፤ ልደታ፤ በ፫፡ ዓመት፤ አብእዋ፤ ውስተ፤ ቤተ፤ መቅደስ፤ ወበህየ፤ ነበረት፤ ፲ወ፪ዓመት፨ እንዘ፤ ትሴሰይ፤ እምኀበ፤ መላእክት፤ ወእምድኅረ፤ ፲ወ፪ዓመት፡ እስከ፤ አመ፤ ወለደቶ፤ ለፍቁር፤ ወልዳ፤ ብዙኀ፤ ተአምረ፤ ወመንክረ፤ ገብረት፨
msItem.explicit:
አስተምሕሪ፤ ኀበ፤ ፍቁር፤ ወልድኪ፤ በእንተ፤ ብዙኅ፤ ተአምራተኪ፤ ወበእንተ፤ ዕርቃኑ፤ ለፍቁርኪ፤ ወዕርቃንኪ፤ አመ፤ ነሥኡ፤ ፈያት፤
ልብስኪ፤ ወልብሰ፤ ወልድኪ፨ ኦማርያም፡ እግዝእትየ፨ እብለኪ፤ ወእትፌሣሕ፤ ብኪ፤ ሰአሊ፤ ኀበ፤ ወልድኪ፤ ለኵሎሙ፤
አግብርትከ፤ ለዓለመ፤ ዓለም፤ አሜን፨

msItem.title: Malkǝʾ-hymns to Our Lady Mary, St John the apostle, all the apostle; invocation to Our Lady Mary
msItem.explicit: ሰ፨ በትረ፤ አሮን፤ ፀዋሪተ፤ ፍሬ፤ ሰ፨ ዘምስለ፤ ዝማሬ፤ ንሰግድ፤ ለኪ፤ ሶበ፤ ይትነበብ፤ መጽሐፈ፤ ተአምርኪ፤ በሰለም፤ ኪያነ፡ ባርኪ። = ።
msItem.note: The invocation to Our Lady Mary is followed by an excerpt from Wangel za-Luqās 11:5-13, with no title.

msItem.title: Invocations to Our Lady Mary, the apostles and other saints
Malkǝʾ-hymn to Our Lady Mary and other saints
Malkǝʾ-hymn to the apostles
msItem.note: The hymn is erroneously entitled to Peter and Paul
msItem.incipit: ሰለም፤ ለከ፤ ጴጥሮስ፤ ዘሮሜ፤ ዓምደ፤ ሃይማኖት፤ ቀዋሜ፤ ጼወ፤ መለኮት፤
msItem.explicit: ሰ፨ ታዴዎስ፤ ልብዴዎስ፤ እንተ፤ ዘፈጸምከ፤ ገድለ፤ በስቍረተ፤ መርፍእ፤ ክህልከ፤ አህልፎ፤ ገመለ፤ ወአርአይከ፤ ዓቢየ፤ ኀይለ፨ ሰ፨ ሰርጐ፤ አናቅጻ፤ ለጽዮን፨ ሐዋርያት፤ አንትሙ፨ ተማኅጸነ፤ ወትረ፤ ኀቤክሙ፤ ዘምስለ፨ ሰጊድ፤ ንኤምሃክሙ፨ በርእስነ፤ እዴክሙ፤ ሢሙ፨

msItem.title: Malkǝʾ-hymn to Gabra Krǝstos
msItem.incipit: ሰለም፤ ለከ፤ ገብረ፤ ክርስቶስ፤ ሰለማዊ፤ መናኔ፤ ዓለም፤ ምድራዊ፤ ዓጽፈ፤ ድንግልና፡ ስርግው፤
msItem.explicit: ሰ። ኀበ፡ መቃብሪከ፡ ሶበ፡ ወረደ፡ ብርሃን፤ ወበድነ፤ ሥጋከ፤ ኮነ፤ ፈዋሴ፤ ድውያን፤ ... ለሰለምየ፤ ኅቀፎ፤ ተወከፎ፤ ወትረ፤ ወኢትግድፎ፤ በተፋቅሮ፤ ምስሌከ፤ ወበተሓቅፎ፤ ሳላም፤ ወአምኃ፤ ነፍስየ፤ ትሴፎ፨

msItem.title: Malkǝʾ-hymn to St George, the apostles and St Sebastian
msItem.incipit: ሰለም፡ ለከ፡ ጊዮርጊስ፡ ኮከበ፤ ልዳ፡ ሰ። ዘምዑዝ፤ እምጽጌ፤ ራዳ፤ ሰ። ዝሑቀ፤ ሥጋ፤ ወአነዳ፤
msItem.explicit: እስከ፤ አግብአከ፤ ለሞት፤ ወመጠወከ፤ ለስቃይ፤ እንዘ፤ እምለ፤ ትነድድ፤ በእሰተ፤
msItem.note: The end is missing due to material loss.

item.note: The quire consists of four leaves badly held together.

item.desc: The note 7, indicating the shelfmark of the fragment in the Vatican Library in the 17th century, is written on the margin.

origin.note: ʾAṣe Galāwdewos, died in 1559, is mentioned in the supplication formula for the ruling king in ; Tasfā Ṣǝyon, died in 1550, is mentioned in the supplication formula for the dead in the same text.

bibl.title: Bybliothecae apostolicae Vaticanae codices manu scripti recensiti iussu Pii XI Pontificis maximi. Codices Aethiopici Vaticani et Borgiani, Barberinianus orientalis 2, Rossianus 865<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Enarratio codicum

msItem.title: Rule of Santo Stefano de' Mori
msItem.note: The same text is also found in No item: BAVet66#i8.

bibl.title: Un monastère éthiopien à Rome au XVe et XVIe siècle. San Stefano dei Mori
Mélanges de l'Université Saint-Joseph
Un monastère éthiopien à Rome au XVe et XVIe siècle. San Stefano dei Mori
Mélanges de l'Université Saint-Joseph

handNote.desc: The handwriting displays some old palaeographical features.

item.desc: List of individuals or magical names
item.q: በስመ። ርጡ፡ እጨ... ዮሀንስ፡ በሰመ፡ ዳቦ፡ አደቦ፡ በስመ፡ ሜሎስ፡ ዋዊ፡ አት...፡ ለገብርከ፡ ጐሪቤቴ፡ ...ገማይ፡ ወከልዑ፡
item.note: The note is poorly readable. It mentions some individuals or magical names, e.g., Rǝṭu, ʾƎč̣a, Yoḥannǝs, Dabo, ʾAdabo, Melos, Wāwi, Gʷaribete, and (...)gamay.

bibl.title: Bybliothecae apostolicae Vaticanae codices manu scripti recensiti iussu Pii XI Pontificis maximi. Codices Aethiopici Vaticani et Borgiani, Barberinianus orientalis 2, Rossianus 865<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Enarratio codicum

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)
